rules:
This Feature may be purchased for your fleet when you build your list. It must be assigned to a Ship with the Porter special rule as if it were a Ship with the Payload S-1 special rule.
When one or more enemy Battalions on this Dropsite and its Features are removed for any reason, place 2 friendly Battalions on this Dropsite regardless of the number of Battalions removed or Genitor Towers on this Dropsite. If these Battalions are gained through Battalion Combat, they are placed after Battalion Combat.
When this Feature is destroyed, it contributes its points to the Kill Points of the opposing player that destroyed it.
